name: @skintyee/api
description: Skin Tyee API — NestJS implementation of the OpenAPI contract (in-memory data layer for the POC).

scripts.db:backup:prod: az postgres flexible-server backup create --resource-group skintyee-prod-rg --name skintyee-prod-pg --backup-name "manual-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
scripts.db:backup:prod:list: az postgres flexible-server backup list --resource-group skintyee-prod-rg --name skintyee-prod-pg --query "reverse(sort_by([], &completedTime))[].{name:name, type:backupType, completedTime:completedTime}" -o table
scripts.db:backup:prod:tagged: test -n "$TAG" || (echo 'set TAG, e.g. TAG=pre-bandgroups pnpm db:backup:prod:tagged' && exit 1); az postgres flexible-server backup create --resource-group skintyee-prod-rg --name skintyee-prod-pg --backup-name "$TAG-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
